releases.changelog: Script hardening (JSDoc, validation, circular dep detection, error standardization, git escaping fix), feature-update subcommand, per-step metrics with metrics-summary, structured event logging (events.jsonl), postmortem command (/harness:postmortem), postmortem-data subcommand for deterministic data gathering. Also fixes: round numbering offset (initializer starts at 0), error recovery writes handoff before retry.

Script automation for harness mechanical operations. Added harness-companion.mjs with 7 subcommands (feature-select, state-mutate, auto-commit, validate-artifacts, progress-append, check-stop, cleanup-sprints). Zero npm dependencies, atomic JSON writes, structured JSON stdout. Wired into hooks.json, session.md, and coordinator.md. Fixed evaluator codex documentation-only exemption.

BREAKING: /harness:init renamed to /harness:start (F-003). Core framework made domain-agnostic: generic evaluation schema, runtime verification, cross-domain composability (F-001, F-002). SDLC suite index gains cross-phase handoff protocol, criteria key mapping, domain verification methods (F-004-F-006). All 4 non-software domain skills fleshed out with practical templates: EA (Zachman, FEAF, ADR, ArchiMate tools), BA (elicitation, prioritization, sign-off, traceability), SA (DDD, API contracts, STRIDE, capacity modeling), Ops (GitOps, SRE, runbooks, incident response, DORA metrics) (F-007-F-010).

Fix Codex evaluation detection and review integration. Detection logic in advanced.md rewritten to check 3 sources (project enabledPlugins, global extraKnownMarketplaces, CLI on PATH) with any-one-passes semantics. Review method changed from raw codex CLI to /codex:adversarial-review plugin skill with severity mapping. Evaluator.md decision tree updated to match. Also includes README Sync from prior sprint.

Added README Sync section to releaser role file. The releaser now verifies and updates README.md during every release: checks version references, architecture diagrams, skills/profiles tables, and install command URLs. Domain-agnostic discovery via glob patterns. No breaking changes.

Two-plugin architecture: Refactored harness from single-plugin monolith into domain-blind core (harness) + domain skill suite (harness-sdlc-suite). Core SKILL.md has zero references to specific domain skills. SDLC suite bundles 5 domain skills with an index skill for profile routing. Updated marketplace manifest, Codex manifest, and install scripts for dual-plugin discovery and installation. Updated README with new architecture diagram and install commands. Breaking change to plugin structure.

Harness Kernel Simplification: Deduplicated 6 agent files into thin YAML wrappers (-317 lines), extracted shared command pre-flight to SKILL.md, moved non-core SKILL.md sections to references/advanced.md (-60 lines), condensed Codex detection to decision tree, made calibration conditional on expected_sprint_count > 3, merged retrospectives inline into progress.md. No behavioral changes. Marks harness as mature at v1.0.0.

Renamed Authenticity Gate dimension 'coherence' to 'internal_consistency' across all 6 base framework files. Removed 3 disambiguation notes that are no longer needed. No logic changes -- text substitution only.

Authenticity Gate: Added domain-agnostic binary pass/fail quality gate with 4 dimensions (coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness for purpose) to the harness base framework. Gate runs after domain criteria scoring as a cross-cutting overlay. Dual-side control: generator pre-implementation checklist (prevention) and evaluator post-grading gate (detection). All text uses generic middleware language.

Domain Skills Expansion: Added 3 new domain skills (harness-ba for business_analysis, harness-sa for solution_architecture, harness-ops for ops) following the 10-section pattern. Updated SKILL.md routing table and Domain Profiles table. Verified plugin.json discovery.

Harness Workflow Integrity: Added pre-flight/post-flight guards to all 5 commands, moved release artifacts to project root, added manifest sync, added skill activation checks, added workflow entry integrity invariants.
